Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer for unbound SD-JWT; Wallet collects credential via OID4VCI
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Immediate issuance (deferred = false)
- No holder key binding
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with offer_deeplink; Wallet successfully retrieves unbound SD-JWT

Action: Business Verifier creates DCQL-based verification request with mandatory holder binding requirement via OID4VP v1
Data:
- DCQL query with holder binding requirement (withUniversityDCQL)
- Verification request deeplink
- Holder binding proof mandatory
Expected Result: Verifier returns HTTP 200 with verification request requiring holder key binding

Action: Wallet constructs presentation from unbound credential (no holder binding proof); Wallet submits to verifier
Data:
- DCQL query requiring holder binding
- Unbound SD-JWT credential (no holder key binding)
- OID4VP v1 endpoint
Expected Result: Verifier decryption/validation fails due to missing holder binding; Verifier rejects with HTTP 400: error='invalid_transaction_data', error_code='holder_binding_mismatch', error_description='Missing Holder Key Binding Proof'
